step_rationale: Oxidized PUFA metabolite inhibiting platelet aggregation.
mechanism: 13-HODE, an oxidized linoleic acid metabolite, suppresses platelet aggregation and protects against thrombosis in Type 1 MI.

references.title: Acute coronary syndrome remodels the antiplatelet aggregation properties of HDL particle subclasses.
references.journal: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH
